　一个嘴贱无敌吵架没输过的璟王爷，
　一个人人夸赞贤良淑德的璟王妃，
　还有一个名声稀碎臭名昭著的璟王府。
　在皇权至上的阶级社会里，楚清荣谨言慎行的当着她的璟王妃，不敢多言，不敢吃醋，不敢专宠，本本分分的扮演着贤妻。
一觉醒来身体互换，顾渊看着镜子里的自己，他怎么就长成了王妃的样子了？
表面嫌弃实则享受的顾渊自打当上女人后，他就开始放飞自我，怼天怼地怼京城贵妇，还差点把自己怼成下堂妇。
一朝有孕，父凭子贵成了王妃的心头宝，虽说男人生子闻所未闻，但他顾渊不是一般人，王妃这回得围着他转了吧？
*
一日闲来无事，楚清荣问道:“京城女子众多，你为何偏偏要娶我？”
“在遇见你之前，我一直以为我喜欢的是男子，就在那天，就那么一眼，我就确定了自己喜欢的人可以是男人，也可以是女人，但那人必须是你，而刚好你是女子。”
她深知皇家最是无情，男子最是多情，偏偏顾渊是个痴情种，他曾说这世上他拿她最没有法子，她又何尝不是。
*
楚清荣抱着他刚生下来的孩子，满意极了，“王爷，孩子还是太少了。”
顾渊脸色一变，低头数了数:你当我是母猪还是耗子？要不你还是休了我吧！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob6f47e27724e9a479eb8c33193376f76~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"阿雲","author_id":"","book_id":"7489801846450555929","book_name":"身体互换后，王爷只想摆烂当孕妻","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#481818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2031人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":30,"name":"宠妻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=30&name=宠妻&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":85,"name":"王妃","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=85&name=王妃&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":877,"name":"古色古香","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=877&name=古色古香&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7489805137523769881","read_count":"2031","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"335215"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"160","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,宠妻,王妃,无敌,古色古香","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/df17f972e58610beba1aefa69733dddb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183379&x-signature=ActjeCv7YNpbYNEPRO3SssbaRmI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"102977464871","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"45"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201736198251190CFFDB426C9429"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16065,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4661},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7574034459544011545","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看，有乐趣，男主嘴真的好厉害，口才棒棒哒，哈哈哈哈，看的让人哈哈哈笑。
而且设定也很有意思，女主竟然是穿越的，但是没有过多描述，我觉得很好，点到位置。虽然开头有很多矛盾，但是这才是生活啊，男女之间的矛盾，尤其在古代，真的很大，就应该让男人体验下女人的生活，省得成天pua。
大大真的写的很棒，期待接下来的作品。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763470589,"group_id":"7489801846450555929","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3H6Wt5TdqqBIqxp/LCmIRJrbwf20vPfmYozQq6VEySg","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4248110305379895","user_name":"鼎汉帝国的李亨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4248110305379895","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7489801846450555929","book_info":{"abstract":"（身体互换+唯爱+清醒+嘴贱无敌）
